title: Manila Heat Wave
lead: Manila is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.69. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Manila are characterized by high temperatures and low wind speeds, with an average wind speed of 1.7 km/h.
 The heat index is further exacerbated by the high humidity level of 71%, making the environment feel even hotter.
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety and reduce energy consumption.
